overall.description: First-person gameplay footage depicting a character walking along a dirt mountain trail during nighttime. The scene features a large tree ahead, rocky slopes on the right, and sparse desert-like vegetation, rendered with realistic game engine lighting.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail toward a large tree visible in the distance

entered.detail: solitary large tree with broad canopy silhouetted against the night sky
rocky mountainside rising steeply on the right side of the trail
unpaved dirt trail winding through the mountain terrain
small desert shrubs and bushes scattered along the trail edges

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wide dirt mountain trail at night, approaching a large silhouetted tree ahead. The rocky mountain slope rises on the right while sparse scrub vegetation dots the arid landscape under a dark clear sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail past the landmark tree

events.description: passing the large tree on the left side of the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing along the mountain trail, passing the tree and proceeding deeper into the dark terrain

entered.detail: mountain range visible in the far distance on the left horizon

segments.scene_description: Passing the large tree on the left and continuing along the winding dirt trail. The path progresses deeper into the mountainous terrain with the rocky slope remaining prominent on the right, while distant mountains become visible on the left horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a nocturnal mountain trail that transitions from a close encounter with a lone tree to a wider view of the distant horizon. It begins with a steady walk along a wide dirt path, approaching a large silhouetted tree that stands against a dark, clear sky. As the camera passes the tree on the left, the trail begins to wind deeper into the arid landscape, flanked by a prominent rocky slope on the right. The scene then opens up as the path progresses, revealing the silhouettes of distant mountains emerging on the left horizon.
